{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Regenerative elixir
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Regenerative elixir]] is a shining pink fluid used to stabilize [[Estyr]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bareius]] drinks a regeneration elixir with every meal.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|an alchemist tried to push a syringe of shining pink fluid into her. Shera caught his wrist. “Regenerative elixir,” he explained.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
